title: convolvulus malvaceus
intro: Convolvulus malvaceus, also known as the bush morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Its health benefits include treating wounds, relieving pain, and reducing fever, as well as its potential in managing conditions such as arthritis and skin conditions. Convolvulus malvaceus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
